case_title: BRANKA POPOWICH VS. ANGIE DEKELAITA ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-05-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-05-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF BRANKA POPOWHICH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANGIE DEKELAITA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARTHA DEKELAITA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVE ANY SERVICE ISSUES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $800.00 FILED BY POPOWICH, BRANKA AS TO DEFENDANT DEKELAITA, ANGIE DBA ANGIE AND MARTHA'S HAIR SALON DEKELAITA, MARTHA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-05-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED JUN-07-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DEKELAITA, MARTHA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-05-2022 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF POPOWICH, BRANKA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DEKELAITA, ANGIE DBA ANGIE AND MARTHA'S HAIR SALON DEKELAITA, MARTHA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
